citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 9:20am on May 6,
2026. The inspector attempted to contact the registrant by knocking and ringing doorbell of front door and barn, phone call
to main number and left message to call back at number provided, second number provided is not in service, shouting,
and honking horn of car. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the
AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.38(b) 
   
Miscellaneous. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 9:20am on May 6, 
2026. The inspector attempted to contact the registrant by knocking and ringing doorbell of front door and barn, phone call 
to main number and left message to call back at number provided, second number provided is not in service, shouting, 
and honking horn of car. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the 
AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
